title: Business Object Attribute Schema
description: Attribute schema for Properties table in Business Object entities.

Meaning.description: What the object means to stakeholders.

Internal Consistency Criteria.description: Criteria that must hold within one instance.

External Consistency Criteria.description: Criteria against other objects or systems.

Sensitivity.description: Planner-friendly sensitivity of the object's content. Maps to TLP: Public→WHITE, Internal→GREEN, Confidential→AMBER, Strictly Confidential→RED.

Lifecycle States.description: States an information-object INSTANCE passes through — distinct from the component-level 'Lifecycle State' enum.
